projectDescription: Framework-agnostic i18n translation framework with compile-time message extraction and type-safe configuration
keyFeatures: Template literal-based message definition with macro syntax
Compile-time message extraction from source code
Framework-agnostic core with React and Carbon integrations
ICU MessageFormat support with pluralization and select
Type-safe configuration with Zod schema validation
CLI tools for extraction, compilation, and building
PO file format support with custom formatter API
Babel plugin and unplugin for build tool integration
publicApiSurface: Say class - Core i18n runtime with locale management
say() - Template literal macro for message definition
say.plural() - Pluralization macro with CLDR categories
say.select() - Select message based on string value
SayProvider - React context provider for i18n
useSay() - React hook to access Say instance
saykit extract - CLI command to extract messages
saykit compile - CLI command to compile translations
saykit build - CLI command to build messages
